untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern requires visual pattern recognition (congestion zone identification, extended period detection ~6 months, resistance formation) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators and operators. The pattern relies on human chart interpretation of multi-month consolidation zones and geometric shape analysis. Approximate proxy conditions provided using Donchian channels for breakout detection and pivot levels for support/resistance, but these do not capture the core pattern logic.
translation_notes: Signal describes a reversal pattern requiring: (1) quick rise, (2) congestion zone lasting ~6 months, (3) resistance at top, (4) breakout direction BOTH. Author provides 69% success rate for downside breakouts, 17% average decline, but is silent on stop-loss, upside success rate, and volume requirements. Proxy entry conditions use Donchian breakout (close crossing 20-bar high/low) as approximation for resistance/support breakout. Exits use pivot-based support (S1) for long positions and resistance (R1) for short positions. Pattern-specific parameters (congestion duration, formation time) cannot be operationalized without custom pattern detection logic.
